content: Self-Refine's iterative no-external-supervision refinement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to resolve the blind spot that single-perspective self-feedback often misses. This creates a hybrid self-improvement system that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data while boosting refinement quality by forcing the model to confront gaps in its initial self-assessment.
